description_long: This is a vintage-style aviator helmet, primarily constructed from quilted dark blue and black leather panels. The helmet features a prominent lace-up seam running from the forehead to the nape, secured with metal eyelets and black laces. Integrated into the front is a pair of classic round goggles with a black frame, attached to the helmet with visible straps. The sides of the helmet display padded ear covers with stitched diamond patterns and metal buckles for adjustment. Two long chin straps hang from either side, each with multiple adjustment holes and a metal fastener. The overall design is utilitarian, evoking early 20th-century aviation gear, with reinforced stitching and a rugged, functional appearance.
description: A vintage aviator helmet made of quilted blue and black leather, featuring lace-up detailing, round goggles, and long adjustable chin straps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lace-up seam, round goggles, and both chin straps hanging down.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the quilted ear cover, metal buckle, and the profile of the goggles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the lace-up seam and the back of the helmet.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the quilted ear cover, buckle, and the side profile of the chin strap.
attribute_graphic_design: Diamond quilted stitching pattern on the ear covers; otherwise plain with no additional graphics.
